topic: My garage door opens every Tuesday at six fourteen AM and there is no automatic opener
title: My Garage Door Opens Every Tuesday at 6:14 AM and We Don't Have an Automatic Opener | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My garage door opens every Tuesday at six fourteen AM. There is no automatic opener.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a detached suburban garage at dawn, wooden double doors partially open, fragments of a padlock on the gravel, no figures, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Detached garage. Wooden double doors. Manual latch. Bought the house in twenty fifteen.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a detached two car wooden garage at dusk, double doors closed, residential backyard behind, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I padlock it every night. Every night.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a steel padlock and a metal latch on a wooden garage door, end of day light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: First Tuesday in October. Came down for coffee. Garage door was open.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an open garage at dawn, light spilling from inside onto a gravel driveway, no figures, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Padlock on the ground. Cut in half.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a cut padlock body on a gravel driveway, the shackle severed cleanly, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Nothing inside was missing. Bikes. Tools. Christmas tree. All in place.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a garage with bicycles on wall hooks, a workbench, and a Christmas tree storage box, nothing disturbed, dim natural light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Bought a security camera. Pointed it at the garage.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a wall mounted security camera on a porch eave aimed toward a garage, dusk ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next Tuesday at six fourteen the door opened. No one was there.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a security camera screen showing a garage door open at six fourteen AM, no figures in frame, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Checked the footage frame by frame. The latch turned itself. No hand. No tool.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laptop screen showing paused security footage with a frame indicator at the bottom timeline, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Six sixteen the door closed. The padlock reassembled itself on the ground.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of the same garage door closed with a reassembled padlock visible on the door's metal latch, dawn light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I take the camera footage to my brother every Wednesday.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an external hard drive on a kitchen table beside a closed laptop, late afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He has not been able to watch past six fourteen.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a paused frame on a laptop screen showing a timestamp of six fourteen AM, no figures visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
